reviews.review_title: Not so cool. Hoped for more
reviews.review_description: Graphics very basic and the gameplay even moreso. Too late for refund and I'll wont play this anymore. Had 10 minutes on it maybe. Check out Youtube vids on this maybe to make your decision.

reviews.review_title: Has promise, Developer clearly given up.
reviews.review_description: Game is fun although the shooting is a little off, still searching for a decent vr western, shame they gave up on this and the enemies just stop coming leaving you stranded

developer_response.body: We continue working on the project, we are working on new improvements, new levels, what happens is that we publish the changes live, without it being a completed game. That's why it can happen that the last level is always incomplete, because we add new improvements and changes as we go. Thanks for your comment!!

reviews.review_description: We've been having fun with it, hope you continue developing it

developer_response.body: Thank you! That's what we're in!!
